reason: Global TianChen-RV architecture and source-of-truth constraints.
RVV typed body, plugin-owned route provider, selected-body realization, and evidence authority rules.
Common EmitC neutrality and TCRVEmitCLowerableRoute ownership contract.
Plugin-local route-provider authority and registry boundary.
Focused lit/FileCheck and ssh rvv evidence expectations.
Current bounded task scope, active route inventory, and acceptance criteria.
Immediate prior indexed computed-mask memory-family migration pattern.
Prior strided-load family migration pattern and validation expectations.

summary: Extended RVVSelectedBodyComputedMaskMemoryRouteFamilyPlan with segment2 load/store facets: operation booleans, segment layout/count, tuple/leaf intrinsics, field roles/names, field source/destination forms, and segment runtime ABI ordering.

Migrated ComputedMaskSegment2LoadUnitStore and ComputedMaskSegment2StoreUnitLoad into isRVVSelectedBodyComputedMaskMemoryRouteOperation, load-merge/store-only classification, memory-form mapping, target leaf/profile/header/C type mapping, inactive-lane/passthrough, source/destination forms, provider-supported mirrors, and family-plan validation.

Made segment2 load/store route support derive from typed body/config/runtime facts: compare producer, segment2 load/store ops, field passthrough or payload loads, field stores, field ABI roles, runtime n/AVL, and RouteOperandBindingPlan closure.

Applied the computed-mask memory family plan to route descriptions for segment2 fields and demoted the later segmented-memory one-off description path for computed-mask segment2 routes, leaving plain segment2 deinterleave/interleave on the existing non-family path.
Updated RVV EmitC provider route-family predicate so computed-mask segment2 load/store require the shared computed-mask memory family plan before materialization.

Updated generated-bundle ABI evidence expectations and four touched target tests to check family plan, mask producer source, target leaf profile, provider-supported mirror, required headers, C type mapping, segment layout/roles, and route operand binding closure for explicit and pre-realized segment2 load/store.
